description: This file defines a Java interface extending JpaRepository for EmailVerificationToken entities, providing methods to find tokens by token string and delete by user ID.

classes.name: EmailVerificationTokenRepository
classes.description: A Spring Data JPA repository interface for EmailVerificationToken entity with custom query methods.

methods.name: findByToken
methods.description: Finds an EmailVerificationToken by its token string.

methods.name: deleteByUserId
methods.description: Deletes email verification tokens associated with a specific user ID.
